data.name: Casual Desires
data.detailed_description:
If you like to get right into the sexy stuff, Casual Desires is the game for you! This light-hearted visual novel focuses primarily on the sexual content and romance, with the protagonist - and those around her - exploring their sexualities and kinks.

Will she stay an innocent virgin? Embrace her sluttiness and become a famous porn star? Or perhaps she will start a romantic relationship, or even a harem? The choices are many!

Features

  • Decide the protagonist's sexuality. Straight, lesbian, or bisexual?

  • A stats screen that tracks the protagonist's entire sexual history, including how many people she has slept with, sexual experiences, and more!

  • Selectable sexual background. It is up to you whether she starts as a virgin, or with one of several other options determining her history.

  • Optional virginity loss for all available sex scenes. It is possible to play the entire game as a virgin, or to engage only in anal sex and foreplay.

  • Romance between the protagonist and male or female characters, which also includes options for exclusive relationships and open-relationships!

Sexual Content

  • Vaginal & Anal

  • Lesbian

  • Exhibitionism

  • Group Sex

  • Double Penetration

  • Swinging

  • Femdom

  • Creampies

  • And much more!

data.short_description: Casual Desires is an erotic visual novel about a half-Japanese teenage girl, and her growing perversions and exhibitionist tendencies. Will she pursue a wholesome romance? Or embrace total depravity? Her fate is yours to decide!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
